yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_FortiGate_CVE202559718_Exploitation_Inci {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Findings"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-11"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59718" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FortiGate" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 2421 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 115 as HIGH risk. 27 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include multiple unattributed groups. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
